title: Services | Piel en Armonia
description: Dermatology catalog with filters by category, intent, and audience, plus booking continuity.

hero.title: A service hub treated like a clinical portfolio.
hero.deck: Browse clinical dermatology, medical aesthetics, and pediatrics with stricter hierarchy, less noise, and clearer entry points.

telemedicine.title: Telemedicine belongs to the same system, not to a decorative subpage.
telemedicine.deck: Start remotely when the case fits and escalate to the clinic when evaluation or procedure requires it.

booking.title: Each program can fall into booking with visible operational trust.
booking.deck: Each CTA keeps service context and aligns pricing, tax, policy, and support in a single flow.
